name: Forensic Heroes VI
original_name: 法證先鋒6 倖存者的救贖
overview: Forensic Senior Chemist Yu Sing-pak, Crime Unit Inspector Tseng Ho-yin, and Pathology Doctor Fan Pui-ching form the elite Crime-busting Trio. Together, they investigate bizarre homicides, using forensic science and pathology to uncover the truth and deliver justice.

trailers.title: [Trailer] Forensic Heroes VI: Redemption 法證先鋒6倖存者 | TVB港劇
